message:
bd-xox.9: Metrics registry completeness and correctness tests

27 tests covering:
- Registry completeness: all 18 declared metrics registered (6 histograms,
  10 counters, 2 gauges), no duplicates, naming conventions (counters end
  with _total, durations have _us/_ms suffix), non-empty help strings
- Histogram bucket boundaries: all defined, strictly monotonic, all positive,
  latency histograms cover sub-ms to worst-case range (>=5 buckets),
  animation histogram has 16ms/33ms frame-rate buckets
- Counter monotonicity: increments always increase, labeled counters are
  independent, 100-step monotonicity stress test
- Gauge range enforcement: terminal_active constrained to [0,1],
  eprocess_wealth constrained to [0,+inf], set overwrites previous,
  labeled gauges independent
- Histogram observations: count/sum accumulate, cumulative bucket counts
- Prometheus text format: counter/histogram/gauge export valid, labels
  formatted correctly, HELP+TYPE precede samples, full registry export
  validates, format validator catches bad types and missing values

Self-contained metrics engine with MetricsRegistry, MetricDescriptor,
Counter/Histogram/Gauge value types, and Prometheus text format exporter
with validate_prometheus_format() validator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
